product.title: Squad Dunk
product.description: Squad Dunk is a first-person online basketball game with physics-based mechanics, built around team play and arcade accessibility.
product.history: Squad Dunk is a first-person online basketball game where each player controls one character on the court and competes as part of a team. Instead of relying on canned sports animations and distant cameras, physics-based mechanics make the game highly immersive, allowing players to lose themselves in the plays like kids. The game is designed to be easy to pick up, with simple rules and fast arcade-style logic, while still giving players room to improve. Players can customize their character, build their squad identity, and play online with friends.

features.feature: Physics-based shots, passes, steals, and rebounds

product.development: In active development by Katapult Games.

press-kit-link.label: Click here for Press Kit Link

product.short-description: Squad Dunk is a first-person online basketball game with physics-based mechanics, built around team play and arcade accessibility.

long-descriptions.long-description: Squad Dunk is a first-person online basketball game where each player controls one character on the court and competes as part of a team.
Instead of relying on canned sports animations and distant cameras, physics-based mechanics make the game highly immersive, allowing players to lose themselves in the plays like kids.

The game is designed to be easy to pick up, with simple rules and fast arcade-style logic, while still giving players room to improve. Players can customize their character, build their squad identity, and play online with friends.

key-feature.title: PLAY FROM THE COURT
key-feature.body: Control one player in first person and experience the match from inside the action, not from a distant camera.

key-feature.title: FEEL THE PHYSICS
key-feature.body: Squad Dunk uses physics-based mechanics to make basketball feel more alive, physical, and unpredictable. Blocks, shots, steals, rebounds, movement, and contact all become part of the moment.

key-feature.title: BUILD YOUR SQUAD
key-feature.body: Play online with friends, customize your character, and build your team identity as you compete together.

key-feature.title: EVERY COURT CHANGES THE GAME
key-feature.body: Each court adds its own twist, with new mechanics and layouts that make teams adapt in different ways.

and accessible","Different courts and scenarios","Character and team customization"]},"media":{"title":"Media","videos":"Videos","screenshots":"Screenshots","download":"download press kit as current Squad Dunk trailer link.","label":"Click here for Trailer Link"}]},"branding":{"title":"Branding","download":"download logo files as .zip"},"links":{"title":"Links"},"team":{"title":"Team","about_title":"About Katapult Games","boilerplate_title":"About","boilerplate":"A small indie video game studio based in Berlin.
We are Katapult Games and we build games with our community, not just for them. Driven by transparency, flexibility and a love for modern gaming trends, our mission is to create high energy multiplayer experiences that truly connect with players. We don't just want you to play our games, we want you to help us shape them. Welcome to the squad!","credits_title":"Team","credits":"Katapult Games"},"contact":{"title":"Contact","email":"Email","bug_reports":"Bug Reports"}}},"es":{},"ru":{},"ja":{"description":{"heading":"SQUAD DUNKとは？","short":{"title":"ショート説明","text":"Squad Dunkは、一人称視点、物理ベースのメカニクス、チームプレイ、そして遊びやすいアーケード感を軸にしたオンラインバスケットボールゲームです。"},"long":{"title":"ロング説明","paragraphs":["Squad Dunkは、各プレイヤーがコート上の1人のキャラクターを操作し、チームの一員として競い合う一人称視点のオンラインバスケットボールゲームです。","決められたスポーツアニメーションや遠いカメラに頼るのではなく、物理ベースのメカニクスによって、子どものようにプレイに夢中になれる高い没入感を生み出します。","シンプルなルールとテンポの速いアーケードスタイルで、すぐに遊び始められる一方、動き、タイミング、チームワーク、ボールコントロールを通じて上達の余地があります。プレイヤーはキャラクターをカスタマイズし、スクワッドの個性を作り、友達とオンラインで遊べます。"]},"keyFeaturesTitle":"主な特徴","keyFeatures":[{"icon":"🏀","title":"コートの中からプレイ","body":"遠くのカメラではなく、一人称視点で1人の選手を操作し、アクションの内側から試合を体験します。"},{"icon":"🏀","title":"物理を感じる","body":"物理ベースのメカニクスにより、ブロック、シュート、スティール、リバウンド、移動、接触のすべてが、その瞬間のプレイに影響します。"},{"icon":"🏀","title":"スクワッドを作る","body":"友達とオンラインで遊び、キャラクターをカスタマイズし、チームの個性を作りながら一緒に競い合います。"},{"icon":"🏀","title":"コートごとにゲームが変わる","body":"それぞれのコートには独自の仕掛けやレイアウトがあり、チームは状況に合わせてプレイを変える必要があります。"}]},"ui":{"landing":{"nav":{"home":"ホーム","about":"概要","press":"プレス"},"eyebrow":"ゲームプレイリール","tagline":"一人称視点、物理ベース、オンラインチームプレイのためのアーケードバスケットボール。","play":"ゲームプレイリールを見る","close":"動画を閉じる","fallback":"YouTubeで開く"},"nav":{"language":"言語","menu":"メニュー","sections":{"factsheet":"ファクトシート","description":"説明","features":"特徴","media":"メディア","branding":"ブランディング","links":"リンク","team":"チーム","contact":"連絡先"}},"factsheet":{"title":"ファクトシート","labels":{"about":"概要:","developer":"開発:","development":"開発状況:","developers":"開発者:","publisher":"パブリッシャー:","release_date":"発売日:","genres":"ジャンル:","platforms":"プラットフォーム:","cost":"価格:","steam":"Steam:","trailer":"トレーラー:","press_kit":"プレスキット:","website":"ウェブサイト:"},"values":{"about":"Squad Dunk","development":"Katapult Gamesが現在開発中。","developers":"Katapult Games","based_in":"ドイツ・ベルリン拠点","publisher":"TBA","cost":"TBA","steam":"Steamリンクはこちら","trailer":"トレーラーリンクはこちら","press_kit":"プレスキットリンクはこちら"}},"features":{"title":"特徴","items":["一人称視点","物理ベースのシュート、パス、スティール、リバウンド","3人チーム","シンプルで遊びやすい","さまざまなコートとシナリオ","キャラクターとチームのカスタマイズ"]},"media":{"title":"メディア","videos":"動画","screenshots":"スクリーンショット","download":"プレスキットを.rarでダウンロード","video_cards":[{"title":"ゲームプレイリール","description":"一人称視点、物理ベースのバスケットボールゲームプレイリール。","label":"YouTubeで見る"},{"title":"リビールトレーラー","description":"現在のSquad Dunkトレーラーリンク。","label":"トレーラーリンクはこちら"}]},"branding":{"title":"ブランディング","download":"ロゴファイルを.zipでダウンロード"},"links":{"title":"リンク"},"team":{"title":"チーム","about_title":"Katapult Gamesについて","boilerplate_title":"概要","boilerplate":"ベルリンを拠点とする小さなインディーゲームスタジオです。
私たちはKatapult Gamesです。私たちはコミュニティのためだけでなく、コミュニティと一緒にゲームを作ります。透明性、柔軟性、現代のゲームトレンドへの愛を大切にし、プレイヤーと本当に繋がる高エネルギーなマルチプレイヤー体験を目指しています。私たちはただ遊んでもらうだけでなく、一緒に形作ってほしいと考えています。Welcome to the squad!","credits_title":"チーム","credits":"Katapult Games"},"contact":{"title":"連絡先","email":"メール","bug_reports":"バグ報告"}}},"zh":{},"de":{"description":{"heading":"WAS IST SQUAD DUNK?","short":{"title":"KURZBESCHREIBUNG","text":"Squad Dunk ist ein Online-Basketballspiel aus der First-Person-Perspektive mit physikbasierten Mechaniken, das auf Teamplay und Arcade-Zugänglichkeit ausgelegt ist."},"long":{"title":"LANGE BESCHREIBUNG","paragraphs":["Squad Dunk ist ein Online-Basketballspiel aus der First-Person-Perspektive, in dem jede Person einen Charakter auf dem Court steuert und als Teil eines Teams antritt.","Statt auf vorgefertigte Sportanimationen und entfernte Kameras zu setzen, sorgen physikbasierte Mechaniken für ein besonders immersives Spielgefühl, bei dem man sich wie Kinder direkt in den Spielzügen verlieren kann.","Das Spiel ist leicht zugänglich, mit einfachen Regeln und schneller Arcade-Logik, bietet aber trotzdem Raum, besser zu werden. Spielerinnen und Spieler können ihren Charakter anpassen, eine eigene Squad-Identität aufbauen und online mit Freundinnen und Freunden spielen."]},"keyFeaturesTitle":"Hauptfeatures","keyFeatures":[{"icon":"🏀","title":"SPIEL DIREKT VOM COURT","body":"Steuere einen Spieler in der First-Person-Perspektive und erlebe das Match mitten aus der Action heraus, nicht aus einer entfernten Kamera."},{"icon":"🏀","title":"SPÜRE DIE PHYSIK","body":"Physikbasierte Mechaniken machen Basketball lebendiger, körperlicher und unvorhersehbarer. Blocks, Würfe, Steals, Rebounds, Bewegung und Kontakt werden Teil jedes Moments."},{"icon":"🏀","title":"BAUE DEIN SQUAD","body":"Spiele online mit Freunden, passe deinen Charakter an und baue gemeinsam mit deinem Team eine eigene Identität auf."},{"icon":"🏀","title":"JEDER COURT VERÄNDERT DAS SPIEL","body":"Jeder Court bringt eigene Twists, Mechaniken und Layouts mit, an die sich Teams auf unterschiedliche Weise anpassen müssen."}]},"ui":{"landing":{"nav":{"home":"Home","about":"Über das Spiel","press":"Presse"},"eyebrow":"Gameplay-Reel","tagline":"First-Person, physikbasierter Online-Basketball für Arcade-Teamplay.","play":"Gameplay-Reel ansehen","close":"Video schließen","fallback":"Auf YouTube öffnen"},"nav":{"language":"Sprache","menu":"Menü","sections":{"factsheet":"Factsheet","description":"Beschreibung","features":"Features","media":"Medien","branding":"Branding","links":"Links","team":"Team","contact":"Kontakt"}},"factsheet":{"title":"Factsheet","labels":{"about":"Über:","developer":"Entwickler:","development":"Entwicklung:","developers":"Entwickler:","publisher":"Publisher:","release_date":"Veröffentlichung:","genres":"Genres:","platforms":"Plattformen:","cost":"Preis:","steam":"Steam:","trailer":"Trailer:","press_kit":"Press Kit:","website":"Website:"},"values":{"about":"Squad Dunk","development":"In aktiver Entwicklung bei Katapult Games.","developers":"Katapult Games","based_in":"Sitz in Berlin, Deutschland","publisher":"TBA","cost":"TBA","steam":"Hier zum Steam-Link","trailer":"Hier zum Trailer-Link","press_kit":"Hier zum Press-Kit-Link"}},"features":{"title":"Features","items":["First-Person-Perspektive","Physikbasierte Würfe, Pässe, Steals und Rebounds","Teams mit 3 Spielerinnen und Spielern","Einfach und zugänglich","Verschiedene Courts und Szenarien","Charakter- und Team-Anpassung"]},"media":{"title":"Medien","videos":"Videos","screenshots":"Screenshots","download":"Press Kit als .rar herunterladen","video_cards":[{"title":"Gameplay-Reel","description":"First-Person, physikbasiertes Basketball-Gameplay-Reel.","label":"Auf YouTube ansehen"},{"title":"Reveal-Trailer","description":"Aktueller Squad Dunk Trailer-Link.","label":"Hier zum Trailer-Link"}]},"branding":{"title":"Branding","download":"Logodateien als .zip herunterladen"},"links":{"title":"Links"},"team":{"title":"Team","about_title":"Über Katapult Games","boilerplate_title":"Über uns","boilerplate":"Ein kleines Indie-Videospielstudio mit Sitz in Berlin.
Wir sind Katapult Games und wir entwickeln Spiele mit unserer Community, nicht nur für sie. Angetrieben von Transparenz, Flexibilität und einer Liebe für moderne Gaming-Trends wollen wir energiegeladene Multiplayer-Erlebnisse schaffen, die Spielerinnen und Spieler wirklich verbinden. Wir möchten nicht nur, dass ihr unsere Spiele spielt, sondern dass ihr helft, sie mitzugestalten. Welcome to the squad!","credits_title":"Team","credits":"Katapult Games"},"contact":{"title":"Kontakt","email":"E-Mail","bug_reports":"Bug Reports"}}},"fr":{},"pt":{}}}

media-video.title: Reveal Trailer
media-video.label: Click here for Trailer Link
media-video.description: Watch the current Squad Dunk trailer link.

manifest-screenshot.title: Gameplay screenshot 01
manifest-screenshot.alt: Squad Dunk first-person basketball gameplay screenshot.

manifest-screenshot.title: Gameplay screenshot 02
manifest-screenshot.alt: Squad Dunk multiplayer basketball gameplay screenshot.

manifest-screenshot.title: Gameplay screenshot 03
manifest-screenshot.alt: Squad Dunk physics-based basketball gameplay screenshot.

team.boilerplate: A small indie video game studio based in Berlin. We are Katapult Games and we build games with our community, not just for them. Driven by transparency, flexibility and a love for modern gaming trends, our mission is to create high energy multiplayer experiences that truly connect with players. We don't just want you to play our games, we want you to help us shape them. Welcome to the squad!
